I now have the core files; I’ll grab the dependency and example input locations so you can give the other agent everything needed to run it immediately.

The report template code is here:

- Main layout/template logic: [memo/template.py](memo/template.py#L11)
- PDF builder that uses the template: [memo/generator.py](memo/generator.py#L94)
- Data schema for all template fields: [memo/schema.py](memo/schema.py#L22)
- CLI entry point for generating a report PDF: [memo/cli.py](memo/cli.py#L9)
- Example input payload for the template: [memo/examples/memo_input_example.yaml](memo/examples/memo_input_example.yaml#L1)
- Required dependencies (includes reportlab, PyYAML): [requirements.txt](requirements.txt#L1)

If you want another agent to recreate this in a different repo, tell it to copy the whole [memo](memo) package, not just [memo/template.py](memo/template.py), because the template depends on [memo/schema.py](memo/schema.py#L22) and [memo/generator.py](memo/generator.py#L12).
